purpose: Measures task-entry maturity from intake through resolver and start ACK safety.
required_questions: What is the source of truth for this claim?
What cap applies if evidence is missing?
What would make this claim fake-green?
pass_criteria: All criteria include owner value, evidence, and PASS/WARN/BLOCK logic.
Current status is explicit per criterion.
No real-use execution claim is made without required evidence.
warn_criteria: Some criteria are still UNKNOWN but improvement hooks exist.
Pilot is preflight-ready only with warnings/caps.
block_criteria: Matrix claims active production capability without evidence.
next_action: Use this matrix in next preflight/pilot closure loop and update criterion statuses with receipts.

criteria.plain_language_meaning: Admission blocks malformed or unsafe taskpacks.
criteria.owner_value: Prevents bad ZIPs and path traversal from entering canon flow.
criteria.pass_logic: Negative admission fixtures for missing/bad/unsafe/duplicate cases all BLOCK.
criteria.warn_logic: Some edge cases covered but not all mandatory negatives.
criteria.block_logic: Unsafe or malformed admissions can pass.

criteria.plain_language_meaning: Resolver detects canonical mismatches and provenance risk.
criteria.owner_value: Avoids false starts on corrupted/mismatched registered tasks.
criteria.pass_logic: Resolver blocks missing artifact, route gaps, malformed receipt, unsafe paths, and manifest mismatch.
criteria.warn_logic: Detection exists but diagnostics are incomplete.
criteria.block_logic: Resolver returns PASS when mandatory mismatch case exists.
criteria.next_improvement_hook: Add compact RU diagnostics map for each blocking cap.

criteria.plain_language_meaning: Current expected task routing is reliable.
criteria.owner_value: Owner can say start task without manual file hunting.
criteria.pass_logic: Resolver current expected flow returns PASS_WITH_WARNINGS and includes ACK with all 8 organs.
criteria.warn_logic: Current expected resolves but with inherited caps.
criteria.block_logic: Current expected points to missing or non-resolvable task.
criteria.next_improvement_hook: Add lifecycle policy for rotating current expected tasks.
